title: cyclosorus connivens
intro: Cyclosorus connivens, also known as the creeping cyclosorus, is a type of fern native to tropical Africa, Asia, and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus connivens include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and injuries. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various health issues.
